chemical_equation: A chemical-equation panel shows {object_description}. Each coefficient multiplies the full molecule term next to it.
The image shows {object_description}. Coefficients apply to the entire molecule card that follows them.
This balancing panel contains {object_description}. A coefficient counts repeated copies of the whole adjacent molecule.
The chemistry notation display shows {object_description}. Read each coefficient as multiplying all atoms in the neighboring molecule card.
A chemistry balance diagram presents {object_description}. Atom chips show the atoms inside one molecule term.

missing_coefficient_value: What integer should replace the missing coefficient marked ? so the equation is balanced?
Find the value of the ? coefficient that balances the atoms on both sides.
Which coefficient value belongs in the ? slot to make the equation balanced?
What number must be placed in the ? coefficient box?
Determine the missing coefficient needed to balance the equation.
balanced_option_label: The option numbers fill the coefficient slots from left to right. Which option balances the equation?
Choose the option whose left-to-right coefficient tuple balances all atoms.
Which labeled option supplies balanced coefficients for the equation, reading slots from left to right?
Select the coefficient option that makes both sides have the same atom counts.
Reading coefficient slots left to right, which option balances the equation?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_missing_coefficient_v: a clean lab-style equation with one coefficient box marked ? and molecule cards made from atom chips
a worksheet-style equation with one coefficient box marked ? and molecule cards made from atom chips
a notebook-scan-style equation with one coefficient box marked ? and molecule cards made from atom chips
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_balanced_option_label: a clean lab-style equation whose coefficient boxes are marked ?, molecule cards are made from atom chips, and four labeled coefficient options are shown
a worksheet-style equation whose coefficient boxes are marked ?, molecule cards are made from atom chips, and four labeled coefficient options are shown
a notebook-scan-style equation whose coefficient boxes are marked ?, molecule cards are made from atom chips, and four labeled coefficient options are shown
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_missing_coefficient_valu: set "annotation" to an array of pixel-space bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1], one around the ? coefficient slot and one around each molecule card used to verify the balance
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_missing_coefficient_value: set "answer" to the missing integer coefficient
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_balanced_option_label: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected option card
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_balanced_option_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label A, B, C, or D
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
